title: ophrys tenthredinifera var. sanctae-marcellae
side_effects: Ophrys tenthredinifera var. sanctae-marcellae can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Ingesting the plant can also cause stomach cramps, diarrhea, and vomiting due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts may lead to liver damage and kidney failure in severe cases. Improper use of the plant can also trigger anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention.
